subject: Following up + open question
body:
Hey Jane,

Quick follow-up on our chat at Fintech Devcon last month — also, would you be open to chatting about an early role at our (stealth) company? We're 4 people, pre-seed, building developer tools for the AI agent ecosystem.

We'd want to talk about the founding PM role; comp would be equity-heavy. But I also wanted to ask: do you know anyone good at our level (Sr PM) who's looking right now? Happy to help connect.

Let me know,
Devon
thread: [2026-04, Fintech Devcon] in-person meet at Devon's session

_expected._notes: Multi-intent: post-event follow-up + recruiter-outbound + asking for referrals. No single class fits. Escalate to human review (request-human-input) for decomposition.
